name: Memory Match
title: Memory Match | Weekly Arcade - Free Brain Training Game
description: Play Memory Match free online. Test your memory by matching pairs of cards. Multiple difficulty modes, power-ups, and daily challenges!
keywords: memory game, matching game, brain training, puzzle game, free game, browser game, card matching
tips: Flip cards in a systematic pattern — start from corners and work inward
When you flip a card, mentally note its position even if it doesn't match
Focus on remembering 2-3 card locations at a time rather than the entire board
Match the cards you're most confident about first to reduce the board quickly
Use power-ups strategically when the board gets overwhelming, not immediately
howToPlay: Flip two cards per turn to reveal their faces. If the cards match, they stay face-up and you score points. If they don't match, they flip back over. Memorize card positions and match all pairs to complete the board.
